title: Patch diff viewer
objective: Add a readable patch/diff viewer to help users inspect agent-produced changes before opening or merging PRs.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Render patch.diff grouped by file with additions, deletions, and context lines.
Show summary counts: files changed, additions, deletions, and potentially risky paths.
Handle large patch files with truncation or lazy sections to keep the UI usable.
Surface forbidden path warnings if patch paths match the configured forbidden-scope policy.
Add fixture patches for normal, empty, malformed, and forbidden-path cases.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: patch.diff를 사람이 읽기 좋게 보여주는 viewer를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
